non_claims: no cold-cache filesystem result outside the invalid recorded row
no broad application-workload generalization beyond SQLite/dbm.dumb and TensorRT trace scope
no foreground TensorRT/AI p99 recovery claim
no full crash or power-loss certification

filesystem_modes.cache_state: warm-cache row valid after one warmup pass; cold-cache row invalid when privileged cache dropping is unavailable
filesystem_modes.fuse_cache_setting: final pqc_fuse mount with no writeback_cache option in the runner
filesystem_modes.journal_or_wal_mode: AEGIS-Q encrypted record plus journal/checkpoint path, not an application WAL
filesystem_modes.sync_fsync_behavior: fio psync with --fdatasync=1, queue depth 1, one client

rows.paper_claim_scope: AEGIS-Q-only warm-cache frozen-contract row; not a cross-system superiority claim
rows.workload: fio 4 KiB 70/30 random read/write, psync, per-write fdatasync

rows.evidence_type: application-level WAL/FULL samples and recovery-oracle definition

filesystem_modes.cache_state: no cold/warm filesystem claim; retained samples are application workload observations
filesystem_modes.fuse_cache_setting: historical motivation runner mounts pqc_fuse with -o writeback_cache and PQC_ALLOW_SQLITE_MMAP=1
filesystem_modes.sync_fsync_behavior: SQLite commit path uses PRAGMA synchronous=FULL and retained strace observes fsync/fdatasync boundaries

rows.paper_claim_scope: WAL/FULL workload evidence only; not the SQLite QoS recovery table and not crash certification
rows.workload: SQLite transactions and contention samples using WAL/FULL

filesystem_modes.cache_state: fresh temporary lower directory per mode; not a cold-cache filesystem baseline
filesystem_modes.fuse_cache_setting: final pqc_fuse mount; foreground file marked latency, background file marked elastic with user.pqc_qos_class
filesystem_modes.journal_or_wal_mode: PRAGMA journal_mode=DELETE for the QoS bundle
filesystem_modes.sync_fsync_behavior: SQLite PRAGMA synchronous=FULL; background writer uses secure-storage writes and daemon throttle traces

rows.paper_claim_scope: SQLite DELETE/FULL recovery under mounted AEGIS-Q pressure, not SQLite WAL/FULL and not TensorRT/AI recovery
rows.workload: SQLite foreground transactions under mounted secure-storage pressure

filesystem_modes.cache_state: same-backing-store stale snapshot replay, not cold/warm cache benchmarking
filesystem_modes.fuse_cache_setting: TPM-backed pqc_fuse mounted without writeback_cache option in the combined durability runner
filesystem_modes.journal_or_wal_mode: dbm.dumb persistent .dat/.dir key-value files, no SQLite WAL
filesystem_modes.sync_fsync_behavior: dbm.dumb sync is invoked when available; replay verdict is oracle-based rather than a throughput result

metrics.replay_detail: stale dbm snapshot mounted but dbm read failed closed rc=1

rows.paper_claim_scope: dbm.dumb stale-snapshot fail-closed evidence; not RocksDB, LMDB, or arbitrary append-log certification
rows.workload: Python dbm.dumb key-value store on TPM-backed AEGIS-Q FUSE backing store

filesystem_modes.cache_state: temporary mount per trial; no cold/warm cache distinction or filesystem-comparison claim
filesystem_modes.fuse_cache_setting: benchmark_tensorrt_interference.py mounts final pqc_fuse without writeback_cache option
filesystem_modes.journal_or_wal_mode: secure-storage stream workload, no application WAL
filesystem_modes.sync_fsync_behavior: background secure_writer writes mounted stream.bin and calls os.fsync every sync cycle

rows.paper_claim_scope: co-run interference evidence only; not a validated closed-loop foreground AI p99 recovery claim
rows.workload: TensorRT YOLOv8 foreground inference co-run with mounted AEGIS-Q secure writer

scope: Scoped workload-diversity matrix over retained artifacts.  It separates synthetic fio evidence, SQLite WAL/FULL samples, SQLite DELETE/FULL QoS recovery, dbm.dumb stale-snapshot recovery, and TensorRT/YOLO co-run traces.  It does not create a broad filesystem baseline matrix or a foreground-AI recovery claim.
